published.summaryHtml:
This event occurs when there is activity relating to a repository security advisory. For more information about repository security advisories, see "About GitHub Security Advisories for repositories."

To subscribe to this event, a GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the "Repository security advisories" permission.

bodyParameters.name: enterprise
bodyParameters.description: An enterprise on GitHub. Webhook payloads contain the enterprise property when the webhook is configured on an enterprise account or an organization that's part of an enterprise account. For more information, see "About enterprise accounts."

bodyParameters.name: installation
bodyParameters.description: The GitHub App installation. Webhook payloads contain the installation property when the event is configured for and sent to a GitHub App. For more information, see "Using webhooks with GitHub Apps."

bodyParameters.name: organization
bodyParameters.description: A GitHub organization. Webhook payloads contain the organization property when the webhook is configured for an organization, or when the event occurs from activity in a repository owned by an organization.

bodyParameters.name: repository
bodyParameters.description: The repository on GitHub where the event occurred. Webhook payloads contain the repository property when the event occurs from activity in a repository.

childParamsGroups.name: ghsa_id
childParamsGroups.description: The GitHub Security Advisory ID.

childParamsGroups.name: cve_id
childParamsGroups.description: The Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) ID.

childParamsGroups.name: url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL for the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: html_url
childParamsGroups.description: The URL for the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: summary
childParamsGroups.description: A short summary of the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: description
childParamsGroups.description: A detailed description of what the advisory entails.

childParamsGroups.name: severity
childParamsGroups.description: The severity of the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: author
childParamsGroups.description: The author of the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: publisher
childParamsGroups.description: The publisher of the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of identifier.

childParamsGroups.name: value
childParamsGroups.description: The identifier value.

childParamsGroups.name: state
childParamsGroups.description: The state of the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: created_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time of when the advisory was created, in ISO 8601 format.

childParamsGroups.name: updated_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time of when the advisory was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

childParamsGroups.name: published_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time of when the advisory was published, in ISO 8601 format.

childParamsGroups.name: closed_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time of when the advisory was closed, in ISO 8601 format.

childParamsGroups.name: withdrawn_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time of when the advisory was withdrawn, in ISO 8601 format.

childParamsGroups.name: accepted
childParamsGroups.description: Whether a private vulnerability report was accepted by the repository's administrators.

childParamsGroups.name: package
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the package affected by the vulnerability.

childParamsGroups.name: ecosystem
childParamsGroups.description: The package's language or package management ecosystem.

childParamsGroups.name: name
childParamsGroups.description: The unique package name within its ecosystem.

childParamsGroups.name: vulnerable_version_range
childParamsGroups.description: The range of the package versions affected by the vulnerability.

childParamsGroups.name: patched_versions
childParamsGroups.description: The package version(s) that resolve the vulnerability.

childParamsGroups.name: vulnerable_functions
childParamsGroups.description: The functions in the package that are affected.

childParamsGroups.name: vector_string
childParamsGroups.description: The CVSS vector.

childParamsGroups.name: score
childParamsGroups.description: The CVSS score.

childParamsGroups.name: vector_string
childParamsGroups.description: The CVSS 3 vector string.

childParamsGroups.name: score
childParamsGroups.description: The CVSS 3 score.

childParamsGroups.name: vector_string
childParamsGroups.description: The CVSS 4 vector string.

childParamsGroups.name: score
childParamsGroups.description: The CVSS 4 score.

childParamsGroups.name: cwe_id
childParamsGroups.description: The Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) identifier.

childParamsGroups.name: name
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the CWE.

childParamsGroups.name: cwe_ids
childParamsGroups.description: A list of only the CWE IDs.

childParamsGroups.name: login
childParamsGroups.description: The username of the user credited.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of credit the user is receiving.

childParamsGroups.name: user
childParamsGroups.description: A GitHub user.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of credit the user is receiving.

childParamsGroups.name: state
childParamsGroups.description: The state of the user's acceptance of the credit.

childParamsGroups.name: collaborating_users
childParamsGroups.description: A list of users that collaborate on the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: collaborating_teams
childParamsGroups.description: A list of teams that collaborate on the advisory.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The ownership type of the team

childParamsGroups.name: organization_id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the organization to which this team belongs

childParamsGroups.name: enterprise_id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the enterprise to which this team belongs

childParamsGroups.name: parent
childParamsGroups.description: Groups of organization members that gives permissions on specified repositories.

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the team

childParamsGroups.name: url
childParamsGroups.description: URL for the team

childParamsGroups.name: name
childParamsGroups.description: Name of the team

childParamsGroups.name: description
childParamsGroups.description: Description of the team

childParamsGroups.name: permission
childParamsGroups.description: Permission that the team will have for its repositories

childParamsGroups.name: privacy
childParamsGroups.description: The level of privacy this team should have

childParamsGroups.name: notification_setting
childParamsGroups.description: The notification setting the team has set

childParamsGroups.name: ldap_dn
childParamsGroups.description: Distinguished Name (DN) that team maps to within LDAP environment

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The ownership type of the team

childParamsGroups.name: organization_id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the organization to which this team belongs

childParamsGroups.name: enterprise_id
childParamsGroups.description: Unique identifier of the enterprise to which this team belongs

childParamsGroups.name: private_fork
childParamsGroups.description: A temporary private fork of the advisory's repository for collaborating on a fix.

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: A unique identifier of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: node_id
childParamsGroups.description: The GraphQL identifier of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: name
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: full_name
childParamsGroups.description: The full, globally unique, name of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: owner
childParamsGroups.description: A GitHub user.

childParamsGroups.name: private
childParamsGroups.description: Whether the repository is private.

childParamsGroups.name: html_url
childParamsGroups.description: The URL to view the repository on GitHub.com.

childParamsGroups.name: description
childParamsGroups.description: The repository description.

childParamsGroups.name: fork
childParamsGroups.description: Whether the repository is a fork.

childParamsGroups.name: url
childParamsGroups.description: The URL to get more information about the repository from the GitHub API.

childParamsGroups.name: archive_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to download the repository as an archive.

childParamsGroups.name: assignees_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to list the available assignees for issues in the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: blobs_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to create or retrieve a raw Git blob in the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: branches_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about branches in the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: collaborators_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about collaborators of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: comments_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about comments on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: commits_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about commits on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: compare_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to compare two commits or refs.

childParamsGroups.name: contents_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get the contents of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: contributors_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to list the contributors to the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: deployments_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the deployments of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: downloads_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the downloads on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: events_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the events of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: forks_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the forks of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: git_commits_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about Git commits of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: git_refs_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about Git refs of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: git_tags_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about Git tags of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: issue_comment_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about issue comments on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: issue_events_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about issue events on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: issues_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about issues on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: keys_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about deploy keys on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: labels_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about labels of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: languages_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to get information about the languages of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: merges_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to merge branches in the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: milestones_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about milestones of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: notifications_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about notifications on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: pulls_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about pull requests on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: releases_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about releases on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: stargazers_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the stargazers on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: statuses_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to get information about statuses of a commit.

childParamsGroups.name: subscribers_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the subscribers on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: subscription_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to subscribe to notifications for this repository.

childParamsGroups.name: tags_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to get information about tags on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: teams_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the teams on the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: trees_url
childParamsGroups.description: A template for the API URL to create or retrieve a raw Git tree of the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: hooks_url
childParamsGroups.description: The API URL to list the hooks on the repository.

reported.summaryHtml:
This event occurs when there is activity relating to a repository security advisory. For more information about repository security advisories, see "About GitHub Security Advisories for repositories."

To subscribe to this event, a GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the "Repository security advisories" permission.

bodyParameters.description: An enterprise on GitHub. Webhook payloads contain the enterprise property when the webhook is configured on an enterprise account or an organization that's part of an enterprise account. For more information, see "About enterprise accounts."

bodyParameters.name: installation
